archetype: Archetype 1: Organic & Earthy (Storefront) & Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Admin)

fonts.name: Outfit
fonts.usage: Storefront Body, Admin Headings, Storefront interactive elements

fonts.name: IBM Plex Sans
fonts.usage: Admin Body, Data Tables, Dense UI

buttons.primary: bg-[#8C3219] text-white hover:bg-[#6D2511] transition-colors duration-200 rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-medium flex items-center justify-center
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F5F0E6] text-[#1A1716] hover:bg-[#E8DFD3] transition-colors duration-200 rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-medium flex items-center justify-center
buttons.outline: border border-[#E8DFD3] text-[#1A1716] hover:border-[#8C3219] transition-colors duration-200 rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-medium bg-transparent
buttons.admin_primary: bg-gray-900 text-white hover:bg-gray-800 rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium text-sm

cards.storefront_product: bg-white border border-[#E8DFD3] rounded-lg overflow-hidden group hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300
cards.storefront_meal: bg-[#F5F0E6] rounded-xl overflow-hidden p-6 sm:p-8 relative
cards.admin_widget: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm p-4 sm:p-6

inputs.storefront: bg-white border border-[#E8DFD3] rounded-md px-4 py-3 w-full focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#8C3219] focus:border-transparent outline-none transition-all
inputs.admin: bg-white border border-gray-300 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm w-full focus:ring-1 focus:ring-gray-900 focus:border-gray-900 outline-none

tables.header: text-xs text-gray-700 uppercase bg-gray-50 border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-3

badges.storefront_sale: bg-[#B82F2F] text-white text-xs font-bold px-2 py-1 rounded uppercase tracking-wide
badges.admin_status_active: bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800 text-xs font-medium px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full
badges.admin_status_inactive: bg-gray-100 text-gray-800 text-xs font-medium px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full

motion.image_reveal: scale-100 to scale-105 on hover for product images
motion.admin_interaction: fast, minimal transitions (duration-150) for immediate feedback

image_urls.description: Premium organic grocery flatlay, warm earthy tones
Large pot of Jollof rice with vibrant colors
Colorful spice cones displayed in a market
Brown woven basket with assorted food, warm earthy lighting

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the storefront marketing and hero sections to achieve organic, asymmetrical layouts.

Use Shadcn UI components for storefront interactive elements (forms, select, modals) but override styles heavily to match the earthy, premium palette (use #8C3219 for primary brand color, #FDFBF7 for backgrounds).
For the Admin dashboard, use standard Shadcn UI components with minimal overrides, sticking to the neutral/gray palette for a clean, dense, enterprise feel.
Every interactive and key informational element MUST have a `data-testid` attribute based on its role.
Apply `Playfair Display` exclusively to storefront headings. Use `Outfit` for all storefront body text and admin headings. Use `IBM Plex Sans` for admin data tables and dense data views.
Storefront cards should use a subtle border (#E8DFD3) and warm off-white (#F5F0E6) instead of heavy drop shadows.
Ensure contrast ratios meet APCA standards, especially when overlaying text on the hero background image. Use dark overlays (bg-black/40) sparingly or gradient overlays.
Do not use generic placeholder text; implement real-sounding product data (e.g., 'Ayamase Sauce Base', 'Premium Nigerian Brown Beans').
Include data-testid='[element-role]' on all buttons, links, inputs, and semantic wrappers.
